test.query: SELECT number FROM numbers_mt(380000000) AS n inner join ( SELECT 157::UInt64 AS p FROM system.one ) AS o on number = p FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads=1, join_algorithm='hash'
SELECT number FROM numbers_mt(2100000000) AS n inner join ( SELECT 157::UInt64 AS p FROM system.one ) AS o on number = p FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads=8, join_algorithm='hash'
SELECT number FROM numbers_mt(380000000) AS n any inner join ( SELECT 157::UInt64 AS p FROM system.one ) AS o on number = p FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads=1, join_algorithm='hash'
SELECT number FROM numbers_mt(2300000000) AS n any inner join ( SELECT 157::UInt64 AS p FROM system.one ) AS o on number = p FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads=8, join_algorithm='hash'

SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(3e7) AS lhs INNER JOIN numbers_mt(1e4) AS rhs ON (lhs.number = (rhs.number + 1000000000)) OR (lhs.number = (rhs.number + 2000000000)) FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash'

SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(3e7) AS lhs INNER JOIN numbers_mt(1e5) AS rhs ON (lhs.number = (rhs.number + 1000000000)) OR (lhs.number = (rhs.number + 2000000000)) FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(1e7) AS lhs RIGHT JOIN numbers_mt(1e5) AS rhs ON (lhs.number % 100000) = rhs.number FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(5e7) AS lhs RIGHT JOIN numbers_mt(1e5) AS rhs ON (lhs.number % 100000) = rhs.number FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(8500000) AS lhs RIGHT JOIN numbers_mt(170000) AS rhs ON (lhs.number = (rhs.number + 1000000000)) OR ((lhs.number % 100000) = rhs.number) FORMAT `Null`
SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(19000000) AS lhs INNER JOIN numbers_mt(190000) AS rhs ON (lhs.number % 100000) = rhs.number FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(5e7) AS lhs INNER JOIN numbers_mt(1e5) AS rhs ON (lhs.number % 100000) = rhs.number FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT count() FROM numbers_mt(1e8) AS lhs INNER JOIN numbers_mt(1e5) AS rhs ON (lhs.number % 100000) = rhs.number FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = 8, join_algorithm = 'hash'
